description: ECB CISS/SovCISS engine - systemic financial stress (euro area + US/UK/CN/DE/FR/IT/ES) and per-country euro-area sovereign stress from the ECB Data Portal: percentile reads, 0-100 composite, fragmentation gauge. Output data/systemic-stress.json.

schedule.description: ECB Systemic & Sovereign Stress Engine — daily 12:00 UTC
